title: ceratostylis latuensis
intro: Ceratostylis latuensis is a species of orchid native to Borneo, characterized by its unique, white, and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis latuensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing its flowers in hot water or alcohol to create a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
